title: taraxacum aragonicum
intro: Taraxacum aragonicum, also known as the Aragon dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum aragonicum include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a useful treatment for urinary issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a popular natural remedy. Taraxacum aragonicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
